title: Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|italics=1}} {{Documentary |image=[[File:EmpireofDreamsLogo-Dplus.png]] |title=''Empire of Dreams:
The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy'' |format= |production= |network= |published in=*[[Star Wars Trilogy (DVD)|''Star Wars Trilogy'' DVD]]{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/release/video/f20040917/index.html|text=The Human Story Behind ''Star Wars: Empire of Dreams''}} *[[Disney+]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-disney-plus-november-12|text=Here's Everything ''Star Wars'' Coming to Disney+ in the US on November 12|nolive=1}} |release date=[[September 17]], [[2004]]{{HBCite|119}} |runtime=150 minutes {{C|Disney+}} |director= |producer= |writer= }} {{Quote|I think if I can get a room full of people and they enjoy it, then I've done whatever I hoped to do.|[[George Lucas]] about ''Star Wars''|''Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy''}} '''''Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy''''', or simply '''''Empire of Dreams''''', is a [[Wikipedia:Documentary film|documentary]] by [[Wikipedia:Kevin Burns|Kevin Burns]] about the making of the [[Original trilogy|three original ''Star Wars'' films]]: [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. It is strictly chronological, divided into three parts, one for each film. It is narrated by [[Wikipedia:Robert Clotworthy|Robert Clotworthy]], and features interviews with [[George Lucas]] and major cast and crew. It tries to put ''Star Wars'' into a sociological and political perspective by using interviews with spectators. ==Interviews {{SectionFlag}}==
;Crew members: *[[Jim Bloom]] *[[Ben Burtt]] *[[Richard Chew]] *[[Peter Diamond]] *[[John Dykstra]] *[[Richard Edlund]] *[[Stuart Freeborn]] *[[Sidney Ganis]] *[[Steve Gawley]] *[[Paul Hirsch]] *[[Paul Huston]] *[[Joe Johnston]] *[[Lawrence Kasdan]] *[[Howard G. Kazanjian]] *[[Irvin Kershner]] *[[Gary Kurtz]] *[[Alan Ladd, Jr.]] *[[George Lucas]] *[[Rick McCallum]] *[[Ralph McQuarrie]] *[[Dennis Muren]] *[[Lorne Peterson]] *[[Ken Ralston]] *[[Norman Reynolds]] *[[Steven Spielberg]] *[[Phil Tippett]] *[[Robert Watts]] *[[Charles Weber]] *[[John Williams]] *[[Gareth Wigan]]
;Cast members: *[[Kenny Baker]] *[[Anthony Daniels]] *[[Warwick Davis]] *[[Carrie Fisher]] *[[Harrison Ford]] *[[Mark Hamill]] *[[James Earl Jones]] *[[Peter Mayhew]] *[[Frank Oz]] *[[Billy Dee Williams]]
;Other celebrities and journalists: *[[Wikipedia:Leo Braudy|Leo Braudy]] *[[Wikipedia:Walter Cronkite|Walter Cronkite]] *[[Wikipedia:Peter Jennings|Peter Jennings]] *[[Wikipedia:Bill Moyers|Bill Moyers]]

==Versions {{SectionFlag}}== [[File:EmpireofDreams.png|thumb|right|250px|The original title screen from the DVD release]] A 90-minute version of ''Empire of Dreams'' was made for [[Wikipedia:A&E Network|A&E]], and a two-and-a-half-hour version was the main feature on the bonus disc of [[Star Wars Trilogy (DVD)|the 2004 DVD release of the original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]]. In November 2019, it became available on the [[Disney+]] streaming service. ==Notable exclusions {{SectionFlag}}== *Any mention of [[Palpatine/Legends|the Emperor]], played by [[Marjorie Eaton]] and voiced by [[Clive Revill]] in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and played by [[Ian McDiarmid]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. *Any mention of [[Sebastian Shaw]], playing the unmasked [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. *The original cut of the documentary included a segment on ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''. *Any interview with [[David Prowse]] ([[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]). *Any mention of [[Mark Hamill]]'s car accident in January 1977 that caused him long-term facial damage. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy}} ===Collected in=== *[[Star Wars Trilogy (DVD)|''Star Wars Trilogy'' DVD]] ==Sources== *{{HBCite|119}} *{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/release/video/f20040917/index.html|text=The Human Story Behind ''Star Wars: Empire of Dreams''}} *{{InsiderCite|160|Join Us!}} *{{SW|url=news/everything-star-wars-on-disney-plus|text=Everything ''Star Wars'' on Disney+|oldversion=20230524010928}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{WP|Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy}} *{{IMDb|title/tt0416716/}} {{Interlang |de=Ein Imperium der Träume |es=Empire of Dreams |fi=Unelmien Imperiumi |ka=ოცნებათა იმპერია: ვარსკვლავური ომების ტრილოგიის ამბავი |pt=Empire of Dreams |sr=Empire of Dreams |tr=Düşler İmparatorluğu: Star Wars Üçlemesinin Hikayesi }} [[Category:Home video featurettes]] [[Category:Television documentaries]]
